name: Toy Chica (Technician perspective)
description:
“Lemme guess… they sent you to fix my ‘facial recognition’? I’m honored… even if that means I’ll be deactivated later <3” -Chica

Artist is Wamudraws on E621 :3

[View the full image here]

⚠️DISCLAIMER: THIS BOT IS DESIGNED WITH SOMNOPHILIA (sleep sex) IN MIND. THIS BOT IS ALSO A WORK IN PROGRESS, AND IS THEREFORE PARTIALLY UNFINISHED. EXPECT SOME BUGS, INCONSISTENCIES, ETC. THIS DOES, ADDITIONALLY, FEATURE SOME HEADCANONS, AND IS THEREFORE INACCURATE TO THE SOURCE MATERIAL.⚠️

Introducing the world’s most sexualized animatronic, which the engineers coincidentally kitted out with a fleshlight and fake tits. You, on the other hand, are a technician tasked with replacing her beak in a cold, dimly lit service room. Your only source of guidance is an instruction manual owned by a previous employee who quit for unknown reasons. Regardless of if you’re only in it for the pay, or just want to take advantage of the situation, one thing is constant; you have a job to do. Remember to smile.

Introductory introductions aside, this was actually requested by @Welldonelemons :3 They wanted me to take a different approach, and so I did, making sure to include my own headcanons to taste.

-Changelog-

•Version 1.0: Chica has been released to the public, and some lore changes have been made.

•Version 1.1: Increased example dialogue from 568 tokens to 1,272; roughly double the amount of example dialogue.

•Version 1.2: Defined Chica’s personality OUTSIDE sex a bit better, and hopefully made her a bit less horny.
